ogTitle: Giles Corner vs Gilles Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Giles Corner and Gilles Plains.
heading: Giles Corner vs Gilles Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Giles Corner, South Australia and Gilles Plains, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gilles Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Giles Corner (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Giles Corner or Gilles Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Giles Corner has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Gilles Plains scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Giles Corner scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Gilles Plains scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Giles Corner or Gilles Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gilles Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
